current_scope: real f32/f64 owned OdeSession for SDRIV3/DDRIV3 with functional, internal dense/banded finite-difference, or analytic dense/banded JACOBN iteration; owned real and complex DRIV1/2 sessions; residual-only DaeSession with internal dense/banded finite-difference matrices requiring caller-consistent initial data
deferred: DERKF/DDERKF and DEABM/DDEABM: no callback abort
SDRIV3/DDRIV3 mass-matrix and event lifecycle modes: separate callback lifecycle review
SDASSL/DDASSL analytic JAC: no native abort protocol for contained panic/error/nonfinite output
CDRIV3: exact complex expert ABI not reviewed
interoperability: slices and lightweight checked solver-specific Jacobian writers; internal mutable workspace; optional nalgebra/ndarray/faer adapters behind separate features
